title: Wrong behavior after dfflibmap with special cell
code_blocks:
D Flip-Flop with Async Clear, Single Output QN
QN = !RN ? 1 : rising(CK) ? !D : pre_QN

# yosys.tcl
yosys -import
read_verilog -sv top.v
synth -top top
dfflibmap -liberty cell.lib
write_verilog -noattr -noexpr -nohex -nodec netlist.v
